name: @nexuscode/observability
description: NexusCode observability subsystem (system-spec §19) — an OpenTelemetry-shaped tracer (spans with parent/child nesting, trace/span ids), token/cost/latency/TTFT/tool/error metrics, InMemory + NDJSON-file + OTLP-HTTP (seam) exporters, and a TraceStore/timeline query. Plugs into the engine via CallContext.emit(TraceEvent). No heavy native deps.
